trarcane.race.lesser_fairy.description: The Fairy is a race consisting of spiritual beings born from another world from condensed natural mana.
trarcane.race.genasi.description: Genasi are humanoid beings infused with the magic of the Elemental Planes.
trarcane.race.tiefling.description: Tiefling are humanoids infused with the magic of the Lower Planes.
trarcane.skill.celestial_eye.description: It that enhances the user's vision tremendously.
trarcane.skill.replenish.description: Instantly restores your Magicules to maximum capacity.
trarcane.skill.rest.description: Instantly restores your Aura to maximum capacity.
trarcane.skill.disintegration.descriptio: It is the strongest offensive spell among the holy magic. The attack causes spiritrons to fall apart and disperse, erasing everything, both physical and spiritual.
trarcane.skill.holy.description: A divine blessing that shifts the user's soul alignment to Holy. This skill purges the wicked by infusing strikes with holy power and grants ultimate authority over Holy Magic.
trarcane.skill.investigator.description: Allows the user to read the surface thoughts of others, and provides excellent information analysis and processing.
trarcane.skill.milim_eye.description: It greatly enhances the user's eyesight and allows them to see through anything; nothing can hide from their dragon eyes.
trarcane.skill.necro_lord.description: A forbidden necromantic Unique Skill that grants dominion over death, soul-binding artifacts, and partial transcendence beyond mortality.
trarcane.skill.mega_disintegration.descr: A catastrophic ability able to unleashes multiple simultaneous Disintegration fields across a wide area. It is an amplified mass-cast version of Disintegration.
